summary_one_line: Long character-data run with embedded CR/LF and printable bytes that re-iterates the do-while scan loop back to its true condition.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An XML element body containing a multi-character data run that keeps the do-while scan loop alive: printable ASCII / tab / newline content (0x20-0x7F, 0x09, 0x0A) plus at least one 0x0D carriage return followed by 0x0A so the in-loop CR handler executes `continue` and re-evaluates the loop condition at line 4609-4610 with `*in` still inside the accepted character class.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry long (1862/1898-byte) bodies with embedded CR/LF runs (e.g. Seed 2 bytes `0d 0d 0a` at offsets 0x07-0x09 and `0a 0a` pairs) and dense printable char data, so the loop reaches the 0xD handler and loops back to take the true side; the per-role overlay marks the 0xD/0xA continue block [W] only.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive_ctx loser-blocking seeds are short (247-527 bytes), front-loaded with binary/control noise and DTD/declaration tokens rather than long char-data bodies; they never reach the 0xD branch (loser takes it 0 times) so the loop falls through to xmlParseCharDataComplex and the true side stays blocked.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winning technique is baseline naive's undiluted havoc/token budget. naive_ctx's CtxHook folds the call-context hash into the edge-map index, so the same scan-loop edges count as new coverage under many distinct call paths; this fragments the corpus and spreads mutation energy across context-duplicated edges, leaving naive_ctx unable to assemble the long CR/LF-bearing char-data run that naive builds with the same mutators. This is the context-sensitive-coverage feedback acting as a penalty on the loser.

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair is naive>naive_ctx with delta ctx_coverage; naive resolves 8/10, naive_ctx 2/10.
The blocked true side sits at the do-while loop condition testing the accepted char-data byte class.
The 0xD carriage-return handler that loops back via continue is exercised only by the winner.
The loser never takes the 0xD branch while the winner takes it 138 times, and the blocker true side is taken only by the winner.
A winner-resolving seed contains embedded CR/LF bytes (0d 0d 0a) characteristic of the loop-continuing char-data run.
Loser-blocking seeds are short and front-loaded with control/binary noise rather than long char-data bodies.
naive_ctx folds the call-context hash into the edge-map index so the same edge is recorded at different slots per call path.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
folds it into the edge-map index, so the same basic-block edge is
recorded at different map slots depending on the call path that
reached it.

evidence_trail.claim: naive_ctx uses the same havoc/token mutator stack as naive with no I2S or CMP_MAP, so the divergence is feedback-driven not mutation-driven.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
naive's havoc + token stack. No `I2SRandReplace`, no
CMP_MAP.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is context-sensitive coverage (the ctx_coverage delta), not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory lineage I2S-floor check does not apply. The MECHANISM CONTEXT section states naive_ctx uses 'naive's havoc + token stack. No I2SRandReplace, no CMP_MAP' and that its seed metadata shows 'no ParentInfo-only / dash rows', confirming there is no I2S signal to verify; divergence is attributed to the CtxHook feedback fragmenting the edge map, evidenced by the loser taking the 0xD branch 0 times (L4588 T=0 F=317).

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where adding the CtxHook context-sensitive feedback to a naive fuzzer does NOT slow discovery of a long CR/LF-bearing char-data run (naive_ctx resolves the loop-continue true side as fast as or faster than plain naive), which would show context fragmentation is not the penalizing mechanism.

weakest_evidence_point: The causal link from context-map fragmentation to the loser's failure to build the long char-data run is inferential; the seeds confirm the byte feature but not directly that the CtxHook is what starved naive_ctx of that mutation path.
